originContent: # 剪存 - 剪贴板历史管理工具
一个基于 Wails + Vue 3 + TypeScript 的多平台剪贴板历史管理工具。
translatedContent: A cross-platform clipboard history management tool based on Wails + Vue 3 + TypeScript.

originContent: - 支持文本、图片、文件等多种类型
translatedContent: - Supports multiple types including text, images, files, etc.

originContent: - 实时搜索和过滤功能（支持搜索图片中的 OCR 文字）
translatedContent: - Real-time search and filtering (supports OCR text search in images)

originContent: - 本地 SQLite 数据库存储（所有数据只存本地,隐私安全有保障）
translatedContent: - Local SQLite database storage (all data stored locally, privacy and security guaranteed)

originContent: - 个性化设置：密码保护、自动清理、快捷键配置
translatedContent: - Personalized settings: password protection, auto cleanup, shortcut configuration

originContent: 这将启动热重载开发服务器：
translatedContent: This will start the hot-reload development server:

originContent: - 后端 Go 代码修改会自动重新编译
translatedContent: - Backend Go code changes will automatically recompile

originContent: - 前端 Vue 代码修改会自动热重载
translatedContent: - Frontend Vue code changes will automatically hot reload

originContent: 开发模式下，应用会自动打开开发者工具，可以查看：
translatedContent: In development mode, the application will automatically open the developer tools, where you can view:

originContent: 构建完成后，可执行文件将位于 `build/bin/` 目录下。
translatedContent: After building, the executable file will be located in the `build/bin/` directory.

originContent: ### 自定义脚本部署到 Cloudflare Pages
translatedContent: ### Custom Script Deployment to Cloudflare Pages

originContent: 项目使用 Cloudflare Pages 托管在线脚本列表，支持用户从"脚本市场"直接安装和更新脚本。
translatedContent: The project uses Cloudflare Pages to host the online script list, allowing users to directly install and update scripts from the "Script Market."

originContent: 这会打开浏览器，登录你的 Cloudflare 账号。
translatedContent: This will open the browser and log in to your Cloudflare account.

originContent: 部署完成后，脚本将通过以下 URL 访问：
translatedContent: After deployment, the script can be accessed via the following URLs:

originContent: 每次修改 `scriptingExample` 目录中的文件后，重新运行部署命令：
translatedContent: After modifying any files in the `scriptingExample` directory, rerun the deployment command:

originContent: - 确保 `plugins.json` 中的 `scriptUrl` 使用 Cloudflare Pages 的 URL
translatedContent: - Ensure the `scriptUrl` in `plugins.json` uses the Cloudflare Pages URL

originContent: - 部署后通常几秒内生效（Cloudflare Pages 缓存时间很短）
translatedContent: - Usually takes effect within a few seconds after deployment (Cloudflare Pages cache time is very short)

originContent: - 可以通过 Cloudflare Dashboard 查看部署历史和日志
translatedContent: - Deployment history and logs can be viewed through the Cloudflare Dashboard

originContent: # 构建 Apple Silicon 版本
translatedContent: # 构建 Apple Silicon 版本

originContent: ├── app.go                       # Wails 应用结构和 API
translatedContent: ├── app.go                       # Wails 应用结构和 API

originContent: ├── bin/                     # 编译后的可执行文件
translatedContent: ├── bin/                     # 编译后的可执行文件

originContent: 在 `app.go` 中定义的方法会自动暴露给前端：
translatedContent: Methods defined in `app.go` are automatically exposed to the frontend:

originContent: - `SearchClipboardItems(keyword, filterType, limit)` - 搜索剪贴板项目
- `GetClipboardItemByID(id)` - 根据 ID 获取项目
const items = await SearchClipboardItems('关键词', '所有类型', 100)
translatedContent: const items = await SearchClipboardItems('关键词', '所有类型', 100)
1. After launching the app, it will automatically save the system clipboard in the background

originContent: 1. 启动应用后，它会在后台自动保存系统剪贴板
translatedContent: 2. Each time content is copied, it will be automatically saved to the history

originContent: 2. 每次复制内容时，都会自动保存到历史记录
translatedContent: 3. Use the top search box to quickly find history records (supports searching OCR text in images)

originContent: 3. 使用顶部搜索框可以快速查找历史记录（支持搜索图片中的 OCR 文字）
translatedContent: 4. Use filters to filter content by type (text/image/URL, etc.)

originContent: 4. 使用过滤器可以按类型筛选内容（文本/图片/URL等）
translatedContent: 5. Click any history record to view details

originContent: 5. 点击任意历史记录可以查看详情
translatedContent: 6. For image types, click the "Extract Text" button to view OCR recognition results

originContent: 6. 对于图片类型，点击"提取文字"按钮可以查看 OCR 识别结果
translatedContent: 7. Click the "Copy" button to copy the content back to the clipboard

originContent: 7. 点击"复制"按钮可以将内容复制回剪贴板
translatedContent: 8. Click the "Delete" button to delete the history record

originContent: 8. 点击"删除"按钮可以删除历史记录

translatedContent: - **Automatic Recognition**: After copying an image, the app will automatically recognize the text in the image in the background (macOS 10.15+)

originContent: - **自动识别**：复制图片后，应用会自动在后台识别图片中的文字（macOS 10.15+）
translatedContent: - **Smart Search**: Recognized text is automatically added to the search index; enter keywords to find images containing that text

originContent: - **智能搜索**：识别后的文字会自动加入搜索索引，输入关键词即可找到包含该文字的图片
translatedContent: - **Manual Extraction**: On the image detail page, click the "Extract Text" button to view the full OCR recognition result

originContent: - **手动提取**：在图片详情页面，点击"提取文字"按钮可以查看完整的 OCR 识别结果
translatedContent: - **Supported Languages**: Supports recognition of Chinese (Simplified/Traditional) and English

originContent: - **支持语言**：支持中文（简体/繁体）和英文识别
translatedContent: - **Performance Optimization**: The same image is recognized only once, automatically reusing recognition results to improve performance

originContent: - **性能优化**：相同图片只识别一次，自动复用识别结果，提升性能

translatedContent: The database is created automatically and includes the following fields:

originContent: 数据库会自动创建，包含以下字段：

translatedContent: - OCRText - OCR recognized text content (for image types, used for search)

originContent: - OCRText - OCR 识别的文字内容（图片类型专用，用于搜索）

translatedContent: - **macOS**: 10.15 Catalina or later (required for OCR features)

originContent: - **macOS**: 10.15 Catalina 或更高版本（OCR 功能需要）
- **Linux**: 支持 WebKit2GTK 的发行版
每次修改 `app.go` 中的方法后，需要重新生成前端绑定：
translatedContent: After each modification of the methods in `app.go`, the frontend bindings need to be regenerated:
Or use developer mode, which will automatically generate:

originContent: 或者使用开发模式，会自动生成：

translatedContent: The frontend uses Vite + Vue 3 + TypeScript:

originContent: 前端使用 Vite + Vue 3 + TypeScript：
- 支持 TypeScript 类型检查
- 自动导入 Wails 绑定

translatedContent: The project uses CGO (for SQLite and clipboard operations), requiring:

originContent: 项目使用了 CGO（用于 SQLite 和剪贴板操作），构建时需要：
translatedContent: - macOS: Xcode Command Line Tools needed

originContent: - macOS: 需要 Xcode Command Line Tools

translatedContent: Make sure all dependencies are installed:

originContent: sudo apt-get install build-essential libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.0-dev
translatedContent: sudo apt-get install build-essential libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.0-dev

originContent: ### 2. 前端无法调用后端 API
translatedContent: ### 2. Frontend Unable to Call Backend API

originContent: 确保已经运行了 `wails generate module` 生成前端绑定。
translatedContent: Make sure you have run `wails generate module` to generate frontend bindings.

originContent: 如果这个软件帮你省下了时间（或者至少没让你抓狂），欢迎请作者喝杯咖啡 ☕ 或者啤酒 🍺！
translatedContent: If this software has saved you time (or at least didn’t drive you crazy), feel free to buy the author a coffee ☕ or a beer 🍺!

originContent: 每一杯咖啡都会神奇地转化为：新功能、更少的 bug（我尽量）、以及作者熬夜写代码时的精神支柱。
translatedContent: Every cup of coffee magically transforms into: new features, fewer bugs (I try my best), and the author's spirit boost during late-night coding sessions.

originContent: 你的 Star ⭐ 和捐赠是我修复 bug 和添加新功能的原动力（也是我买咖啡的经费）！
translatedContent: Your Stars ⭐ and donations are my motivation to fix bugs and add new features (and also my coffee fund)!

originContent: 如果这个项目对你有帮助，欢迎给项目点个 Star ⭐，这是对我最大的支持！
translatedContent: If this project has helped you, please give it a Star ⭐; it’s the greatest support for me!
